name: Feature request
about: Propose a new defensive-only capability or engineering improvement.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the user or operator problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Defensive Use Case

Explain how the change supports defensive security or privacy protection.

## Scope Notes

Call out platform impact, performance considerations, or compatibility concerns.
